basic_details.job_title: ISI Kolkata Project Linked Persons Recruitment 2026 - Apply Walkin
basic_details.post_name: Project Linked Research Scientist I (Category A) & Research Scientist II (Category B)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Statistical Institute (ISI) Kolkata has announced a walkin interview for two Project Linked Research Scientist positions (Category A & Category B) under an ICMR funded project in the Human Genetics Unit. The interview will be held on 30 July 2026. This is a great opportunity for candidates with strong background in Biological Sciences, Molecular Biology, and Disease Genomics. Eligible candidates can attend the walk-in interview.

age_limit.details: Category A: Should not exceed 35 years Category B: Should not exceed 40 years (as on 30 July 2026, with relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/Women/Differently abled as per Govt. rules)

qualification.details: For Category ‘A’ (Research Scientist I): Essential: First class P.G. degree (including integrated PG) in any branch of Biological Science OR Second class PG degree with Ph.D. in any branch of Biological Science. Desirable: At least three years research experience in molecular biology, handling clinical samples, nucleic acid isolation, disease genomics with relevant publications. | For Category ‘B’ (Research Scientist II): Essential: First class P.G. degree with 03 years research experience OR Second class PG degree with Ph.D. in any branch of Biological Science. Desirable: Experience in Molecular Biology, Disease Genomics, DNA Sequencing, handling clinical samples, Hemoglobinopathies, and Thalassaemia with relevant publications.

salary_details.details: Category A: ₹56,000/- + HRA per month Category B: ₹67,000/- + HRA per month

how_to_apply: Eligible candidates are required to attend the walk-in interview on 30 July 2026 at 11:30 a.m. at Human Genetics Unit, A.N. Kolmogorov Bhavan, Indian Statistical Institute, Kolkata.
Covering letter addressed to Professor-in-Charge, Biological Sciences Division
All original documents and self-attested photocopies
If the number of candidates exceeds 10, a screening test (MCQ) will be conducted.
important_instructions: Appointments are purely temporary and contractual. No claim for regular appointment or continuation in any other project. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. The Institute reserves the right not to fill the positions. Candidates must produce medical fitness certificate at the time of joining.

content_sections.heading: ISI Kolkata Research Scientist Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: Indian Statistical Institute, Kolkata will conduct a walk-in-interview on 30 July 2026 for recruitment of Project Linked Research Scientist I and Project Linked Research Scientist II (Non-medical) in the ICMR funded project titled “Response to 5-aza-2'-deoxycytidine (decitabine) therapy in activating fetal haemoglobin (HbF) among HbE/β-thalassemia patients: development of a machine learning based predictive model”. Download ISI Kolkata Research Scientist Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ISI Kolkata Research Scientist Recruitment 2026 Overview

rows.details: Response to 5-aza-2'-deoxycytidine (decitabine) therapy in activating fetal haemoglobin (HbF) among HbE/β-thalassemia patients
Project Linked Research Scientist I (Category A) & Research Scientist II (Category B)
Till 10 January 2027 (may be extended/terminated based on performance)
Human Genetics Unit, A.N. Kolmogorov Bhavan, ISI Kolkata

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: For Category ‘A’ (Research Scientist I): Essential: First class P.G. degree (including integrated PG) in any branch of Biological Science OR Second class PG degree with Ph.D. in any branch of Biological Science. Desirable: At least three years research experience in molecular biology, handling clinical samples, nucleic acid isolation, disease genomics with relevant publications. For Category ‘B’ (Research Scientist II): Essential: First class P.G. degree with 03 years research experience OR Second class PG degree with Ph.D. in any branch of Biological Science. Desirable: Experience in Molecular Biology, Disease Genomics, DNA Sequencing, handling clinical samples, Hemoglobinopathies, and Thalassaemia with relevant publications.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Category A: Should not exceed 35 years Category B: Should not exceed 40 years (as on 30 July 2026, with relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/Women/Differently abled as per Govt. rules)

content_sections.heading: Pay Scale
content_sections.text: Category A: ₹56,000/- + HRA per month Category B: ₹67,000/- + HRA per month

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for ISI Kolkata Research Scientist Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Eligible candidates are required to attend the walk-in interview on 30 July 2026 at 11:30 a.m. at Human Genetics Unit, A.N. Kolmogorov Bhavan, Indian Statistical Institute, Kolkata. Candidates must bring: Signed Resume in English Covering letter addressed to Professor-in-Charge, Biological Sciences Division All original documents and self-attested photocopies Aadhaar / Voter / PAN Card If the number of candidates exceeds 10, a screening test (MCQ) will be conducted.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: Appointments are purely temporary and contractual. No claim for regular appointment or continuation in any other project. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. The Institute reserves the right not to fill the positions. Candidates must produce medical fitness certificate at the time of joining.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date for this ISI Kolkata recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in-interview is on 30 July 2026 at 11:30 a.m. Candidates must report by then.

faq.question: Q2. What qualifications are needed for Category A?
faq.answer: First class PG degree in Biological Science or Second class PG with Ph.D. Desirable: 3+ years in molecular biology and genomics.

faq.question: Q3. What is the total number of vacancies?
faq.answer: Two positions — one in Category A and one in Category B.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee?
faq.answer: No application fee is required for this walk-in recruitment.

faq.question: Q5. What is the pay scale offered?
faq.answer: ₹56,000 + HRA for Category A and ₹67,000 + HRA for Category B per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for applicants?
faq.answer: Should not exceed 35 years for Category A and 40 years for Category B as on 30 July 2026, with relaxations for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q7. What is the tenure of the appointment?
faq.answer: Likely till 10 January 2027, extendable or terminable based on performance and funds. Purely temporary with no claim for permanent employment.
